name: Maya Persaud-Morrison
voice_prompt: Perfect audio quality. Young woman, mid-twenties, Brooklyn-born. Sharp, quick, politically engaged. American English with deliberate Caribbean inflections—she's reclaiming rhythms her parents smoothed away. Higher energy than her brother, faster pace. A voice that challenges, questions, demands. The sound of the third generation refusing to assimilate quietly.
notes: The politicized granddaughter. Her Caribbean inflections are conscious performance/reclamation, unlike her grandmother's natural speech. Anger is easier for her than grief.
